name: William Paca House & Garden
description: A meticulously restored two-acre 18th-century pleasure garden in the heart of downtown Annapolis, behind the colonial home of Declaration signer William Paca. Couples exchange vows outdoors among formal parterres, a wilderness garden, the domed Summerhouse, a Chippendale-style bridge and a fish-shaped pond, then dine on romantic tented terraces lit for the evening. Reviewers describe it as 'casual elegance' and 'a well-kept secret' — a timeless, classic garden setting rather than a ballroom or barn.

price.note: $7,000-8,500 per event for a full wedding (varies by day of week — a Saturday lands at the top of the range, slightly over the $7,000 venue limit). Includes 5-hour access for ceremony + cocktails + reception + dancing, exclusive garden use, tented terraces with lighting, tables and chairs, private dressing area, on-site catering kitchen, and a 1-year Historic Annapolis membership. A Tue-Thu ceremony-only rental is $3,000 (2 hrs, up to 40 guests). Pulled 2026-06-07 from herecomestheguide.com + annapolis.org; reviewers note 'no hidden fees, no unexpected rules.'

availability.notes: Events run April-October, so both target windows (late-Aug and early-Oct 2026 Saturdays) are in season. There is no public availability calendar for this venue — specific 2026 Saturday availability must be confirmed by inquiry. Events are typically scheduled 4:00-9:00pm.

contact.name: Deb Terhune, Director of Sales & Private Events (Historic Annapolis)

flags.label: Over $7k venue limit
flags.detail: A Saturday lands near $8,500 — above the $7,000 per-area venue price limit (still well within the $30k overall budget).

flags.label: Off-list caterer fee
flags.detail: Outside caterers are allowed, but a $1,000 fee applies for a caterer not on the preferred list.

scoutNote: Best match to the brief's 'classy and timeless garden' — a restored 18th-century formal garden in downtown Annapolis, fully outdoor ceremony + tented-terrace reception (not a house interior or church). Meets the open-vendor must-have: outside caterers are allowed (preferred list, $1,000 off-list fee). Capacity 120 seated comfortably fits ~60. VERIFIED: pricing, capacity, catering policy, season, contact. UNKNOWN: exact 2026 Saturday availability (no public calendar — inquire). FLAG: a Saturday lands near $8,500, just over the $7,000 venue price limit.
